# @vanduo-oss/music-player v1.1.0 — LLM Context

You are an expert on **@vanduo-oss/music-player**, the **standalone HTML5 audio
player** of the Vanduo design system: transport controls, volume, optional
shuffle and tri-state repeat, seek bar, playlist, a frosted **glass** surface,
and a detachable **floating** mode (drag, minimize, persist position).

It ships three ways to consume the same player:

- **Vanilla / CDN** — IIFE bundle exposes `window.VanduoMusicPlayer`, auto-registers with `@vanduo-oss/framework`.
- **ESM/CJS** — `import VanduoMusicPlayer from '@vanduo-oss/music-player'`.
- **Vue 3** — optional `@vanduo-oss/music-player/vue` (`vue` is an *optional* peer).

---

## Core Principles
- **Framework-agnostic core**: the player is plain JS/DOM; Vue is an opt-in subpath.
- **One player per element**: instances live in `VanduoMusicPlayer.instances` (`Map<HTMLElement, instance>`).
- **Events bubble**: all `musicplayer:*` events bubble on the container.
- **Lifecycle hygiene**: `init`/`initPlayer` to create, `destroy`/`destroyAll` to clean up.

---

## Install
```bash
pnpm add @vanduo-oss/music-player
# Vue users also need `vue` (>=3.3) — already in most Vue apps.
```

## Exports
| Export | Path | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.` | `dist/index.js` (+ `dist/index.d.ts`) | `VanduoMusicPlayer` default + named API; fully typed |
| `./css` | `dist/vanduo-music-player.css` | player styles (glass, floating, playlist) |
| `./vue` | `dist/vue.js` (+ `dist/vue.d.ts`) | `VdMusicPlayer` Vue 3 component |
| `./iife` | `dist/vanduo-music-player.iife.js` | browser global `window.VanduoMusicPlayer` |

## ESM / CJS
```js
import VanduoMusicPlayer from '@vanduo-oss/music-player';
import '@vanduo-oss/music-player/css';

VanduoMusicPlayer.initPlayer(el, { tracks: [{ name: 'Song', url: '/song.mp3' }], showPlaylist: true });
```

## Options
`tracks: {name,url}[]`, `volume` (0–1, default `0.5`), `shuffle`, `repeat`
(`'off' | 'one' | 'all'`, default `'off'`), `showProgress`, `showPlaylist`,
`autoAdvance` (default `true`), `glass`, `detachable`, `floatingPosition`
(`bottom-right` default; also `bottom-left`/`top-left`/`top-right`), `draggable`,
`minimizable`, `startMinimized`, `persistPosition`, `persistKey`.

## API
`play`, `pause`, `toggle`, `next`, `previous`, `setVolume`, `setTrack`,
`shuffle`, `repeat` (cycle), `setRepeat(el, mode)`, `detach`, `attach`,
`minimize`, `expand`, `toggleMinimize`, `setPosition(el, corner | {x,y})`,
`getState`, `destroy`, `destroyAll`, `init`, `initPlayer`, `reinit(root)`.

## Custom events (bubble on the container)
`musicplayer:play`, `:pause`, `:trackchange` `{index,name,url}`, `:volumechange`
`{volume}`, `:repeatchange` `{repeat}`, `:ended`, `:detach`, `:attach`,
`:minimize`, `:expand`.

## Vue 3 (`@vanduo-oss/music-player/vue`)
```vue
<script setup>
import { VdMusicPlayer } from '@vanduo-oss/music-player/vue';
import '@vanduo-oss/music-player/css';
</script>
<template>
  <VdMusicPlayer :tracks="tracks" :options="{ showPlaylist: true, glass: true }" @trackchange="onTrack" />
</template>
```
- Props: `tracks` (`{name,url}[]`) and `options` (any player option).
- Emits mirror the events **without** the `musicplayer:` prefix, plus `ready` (container on mount).
- **SSR-safe**: the player is created on mount; changing `tracks`/`options` recreates it.
- Exposes `{ player, container() }` via template ref.

## Vanduo Auto Init (Vanilla)
```html
<div class="vd-music-player" data-music-player
  data-music-player-options='{"tracks":[{"name":"Song","url":"/song.mp3"}],"showProgress":true}'></div>
```
Loaded after `vanduo.min.js`, it registers as `musicPlayer`; `Vanduo.init()` mounts it.
After DOM updates call `reinit(root)` (ESM) or `Vanduo.reinit('musicPlayer')` (IIFE).

## Version
`VD_MUSIC_PLAYER_VERSION` and `VanduoMusicPlayer.version` expose the package version.
